endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/cloudloading/addBook
endpoints.description: Add a user-upload volume and triggers processing.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/cloudloading/deleteBook
endpoints.description: Remove the book and its contents
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/cloudloading/updateBook
endpoints.description: Updates a user-upload volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/dictionary/listOfflineMetadata
endpoints.description: Returns a list of offline dictionary metadata available
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/familysharing/getFamilyInfo
endpoints.description: Gets information regarding the family that the user is part of.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/familysharing/share
endpoints.description: Initiates sharing of the content with the user's family. Empty response indicates success.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/familysharing/unshare
endpoints.description: Initiates revoking content that has already been shared with the user's family. Empty response indicates success.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/myconfig/getUserSettings
endpoints.description: Gets the current settings for the user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/myconfig/releaseDownloadAccess
endpoints.description: Release downloaded content access restriction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/myconfig/requestAccess
endpoints.description: Request concurrent and download access restrictions.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/myconfig/syncVolumeLicenses
endpoints.description: Request downloaded content access for specified volumes on the My eBooks shelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/myconfig/updateUserSettings
endpoints.description: Sets the settings for the user. If a sub-object is specified, it will overwrite the existing sub-object stored in the server. Unspecified sub-objects will retain the existing value.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/mylibrary/annotations
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of annotations, possibly filtered.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/annotations
endpoints.description: Inserts a new annotation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/annotations/summary
endpoints.description: Gets the summary of specified layers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: PUT /books/v1/mylibrary/annotations/{annotationId}
endpoints.description: Updates an existing annotation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ANNOTATIONID}} with a real annotationid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /books/v1/mylibrary/annotations/{annotationId}
endpoints.description: Deletes an annotation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ANNOTATIONID}} with a real annotationid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of bookshelves belonging to the authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}
endpoints.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific bookshelf belonging to the authenticated user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}/addVolume
endpoints.description: Adds a volume to a bookshelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}/clearVolumes
endpoints.description: Clears all volumes from a bookshelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}/moveVolume
endpoints.description: Moves a volume within a bookshelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}/removeVolume
endpoints.description: Removes a volume from a bookshelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/mylibrary/bookshelves/{shelf}/volumes
endpoints.description: Gets volume information for volumes on a bookshelf.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/mylibrary/readingpositions/{volumeId}
endpoints.description: Retrieves my reading position information for a volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/mylibrary/readingpositions/{volumeId}/setPosition
endpoints.description: Sets my reading position information for a volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/notification/get
endpoints.description: Returns notification details for a given notification id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/onboarding/listCategories
endpoints.description: List categories for onboarding experience.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/onboarding/listCategoryVolumes
endpoints.description: List available volumes under categories for onboarding experience.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/personalizedstream/get
endpoints.description: Returns a stream of personalized book clusters
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/promooffer/accept
endpoints.description: Accepts the promo offer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/promooffer/dismiss
endpoints.description: Marks the promo offer as dismissed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/promooffer/get
endpoints.description: Returns a list of promo offers available to the user
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/series/get
endpoints.description: Returns Series metadata for the given series ids.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/series/membership/get
endpoints.description: Returns Series membership data given the series id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/users/{userId}/bookshelves
endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of public bookshelves for the specified user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/users/{userId}/bookshelves/{shelf}
endpoints.description: Retrieves metadata for a specific bookshelf for the specified user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/users/{userId}/bookshelves/{shelf}/volumes
endpoints.description: Retrieves volumes in a specific bookshelf for the specified user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SHELF}} with a real shelf. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes
endpoints.description: Performs a book search.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/mybooks
endpoints.description: Return a list of books in My Library.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/recommended
endpoints.description: Return a list of recommended books for the current user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: POST /books/v1/volumes/recommended/rate
endpoints.description: Rate a recommended book for the current user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/useruploaded
endpoints.description: Return a list of books uploaded by the current user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}
endpoints.description: Gets volume information for a single volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/associated
endpoints.description: Return a list of associated books.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layers/{layerId}
endpoints.description: Gets the volume annotations for a volume and layer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LAYERID}} with a real layerid. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layers/{layerId}/annotations/{annotationId}
endpoints.description: Gets the volume annotation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LAYERID}} with a real layerid. Replace {{ANNOTATIONID}} with a real annotationid. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layers/{layerId}/data
endpoints.description: Gets the annotation data for a volume and layer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LAYERID}} with a real layerid. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layers/{layerId}/data/{annotationDataId}
endpoints.description: Gets the annotation data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LAYERID}} with a real layerid. Replace {{ANNOTATIONDATAID}} with a real annotationdataid. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layersummary
endpoints.description: List the layer summaries for a volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.

endpoints.name: GET /books/v1/volumes/{volumeId}/layersummary/{summaryId}
endpoints.description: Gets the layer summary for a volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUMMARYID}} with a real summaryid. Replace {{VOLUMEID}} with a real volumeid.
